issue.title: Promote dispatch adapter template to IR

artifacts.role: generic PHP-core IR/printer support for static locals and dynamic class construction
WordPress profile now emits WP_Http::_dispatch_request from structured IR
candidate manifest recording dispatch adapter template absence and dispatch IR feature evidence
public-shell snapshots covering the generated transport shell

claims: WP_Http::_dispatch_request is no longer emitted from a compiler-owned raw PHP adapter template.
The WPHX PHP compiler core can emit method-scope static locals and dynamic class construction for bounded adapter bodies.
The WPHX-312.66 oracle/candidate fixture still matches all six deterministic transport selection/dispatch cases after the IR promotion.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http transport dispatch ownership or whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim live cURL/streams/Requests network I/O, DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, or installed WordPress distribution behavior.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
